page: Microsoft Azure L48s_v3 is an LSv3-series virtual machine configured with 48 vCPUs and 384.0 GB of RAM, running on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor. The underlying hardware features a dedicated Intel Xeon 8370C processor operating at 2.8 GHz, with 24 physical cores and hyper-threading enabled, yielding 2.0 threads per core. This server is equipped with a substantial 12012 GB of local storage and is Premium Storage capable, making it highly suitable for data-intensive workloads.

In benchmark evaluations, the L48s_v3 demonstrates strong capabilities in memory and cryptographic operations. It achieves a PassMark memory score in the top 25% tier, supported by a large-block read memory bandwidth of 163.76 GB/sec and a write bandwidth of 70.56 GB/sec. Cryptographic performance is also notable, with the PassMark CPU encryption test scoring in the top 25% at 43900.85. For specialized tasks, the server delivers strong performance in Geekbench image processing and small-model LLM text generation, reaching 282.26 tokens/sec. Other metrics, such as Redis SET operations at 45.6 million operations per second and static web serving throughput at 40.77 GB/sec, fall within the average range.

From a qualitative cost-efficiency perspective, the L48s_v3 offers high resource density by bundling a massive 12012 GB local storage capacity with a 1:8 vCPU-to-RAM ratio. This eliminates the need for external storage attachments for large datasets, optimizing resource spend for storage-heavy deployments. The server is best suited for large-scale databases, data warehousing, memory-intensive analytics, and high-throughput transactional workloads that benefit from direct access to extensive local storage and robust memory bandwidth.
description: The Microsoft Azure L48s_v3 is a storage and memory-optimized virtual machine featuring 48 vCPUs and 384.0 GB of RAM, powered by a dedicated 2.8 GHz Intel Xeon 8370C processor with 24 physical cores. It includes a massive 12012 GB of local storage and is Premium Storage capable. Operating on the Microsoft Hyper-V hypervisor, the instance delivers strong performance in memory-bound and cryptographic tasks, as evidenced by top-tier PassMark memory and encryption benchmark scores. It also excels in image processing and small-model LLM text generation. With a 1:8 vCPU-to-RAM ratio and extensive local storage, the L48s_v3 provides excellent qualitative cost efficiency for data-dense environments. It is highly recommended for large-scale databases, transactional applications, and memory-intensive analytical workloads.
og_description: Microsoft Azure L48s_v3 is a storage-optimized VM featuring 48 vCPUs, 384 GB RAM, and 12012 GB of local storage. Powered by an Intel Xeon 8370C CPU, it excels in database and memory-intensive workloads.
meta_description: Microsoft Azure L48s_v3 features 48 vCPUs, 384 GB RAM, and 12012 GB local storage, optimized for high-throughput databases and memory-heavy workloads.
tagline: A storage-optimized virtual machine featuring forty-eight virtual cores, three hundred eighty-four gigabytes of RAM, and twelve terabytes of local storage.
bullet_points: 48 vCPUs and 24 physical cores powered by an Intel Xeon 8370C processor
384.0 GB of system memory providing a 1:8 vCPU-to-RAM ratio
12012 GB of local storage with Premium Storage capability
Strong benchmark performance in memory bandwidth and cryptographic encryption
Optimized for large-scale databases, transactional systems, and data warehousing
